name: Gera Weiss
profession: Professor of Computer Science at Ben-Gurion University
bio: Gera Weiss is a Professor of Computer Science at Ben-Gurion University. He has led research and development efforts at the intersection of software engineering, formal methods, and artificial intelligence. His recent work focuses on using scenario-based modeling and Behavioral Programming to simplify test automation and Model-Based Testing. Gera collaborates with industry and academia to bring advanced testing techniques into practical software development workflows.
